name: pump.fun
description: Launch a coin that is instantly tradeable in one click for free

methodology.Fees: Trading and launching tokens fees paid by users
methodology.Revenue: Trading and launching tokens fees paid by users
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: pump.fun takes all fees paid by users
methodology.HoldersRevenue: PUMP token buybacks from the revenue

Revenue.LaunchpadFee: Trade fees from launchpad that goes to the protocol
